title: Eta (disambiguation)
content:
{{Youmay|disambiguating "Eta"|disambiguation of "[[Eta Squadron (disambiguation)|Eta Squadron]]"}}
'''Eta''' may refer to:

==Canon==
*The [[Eta-2 Actis-class light interceptor|Eta-2 ''Actis''-class light interceptor]], a [[starfighter]] used by the [[Jedi]]
*The [[Eta-class shuttle|''Eta''-class shuttle]], used by the [[Galactic Republic]] and [[Jedi Order]]
*The [[Eta-class supply barge|''Eta''-class supply barge]], used by the [[Galactic Empire]]

==Legends==
*The [[Eta-2 Actis-class interceptor/Legends|Eta-2 ''Actis''-class interceptor]], a [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] used by the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]]
*The [[Eta-5 interceptor]], a starfighter used by the [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances]] and [[New Jedi Order]]
*The [[Eta-class shuttle|''Eta''-class shuttle]], used by the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] and Jedi Order
{{Disambig}}
